page.content: In the context of Rio Tinto's mining and metals operations for the second quarter of FY2025, the Concentrate offtake agreements and reserve/resource estimates are detailed as follows: In Table 1, under the header UnitsSold, CopperConcentrate sold 50,000 units, yielding TotalRevenue of €150M with an AveragePrice of €3,000 and a GrossMargin of 10%.

lines.text: In the context of Rio Tinto's mining and metals operations for the second quarter of FY2025, the Concentrate offtake
agreements and reserve/resource estimates are detailed as follows: In Table 1, under the header UnitsSold, CopperConcentrate
sold 50,000 units, yielding TotalRevenue of €150M with an AveragePrice of €3,000 and a GrossMargin of 10%.

page.content: GoldConcentrate, with 30,000 units sold, generated TotalRevenue of €90M at an AveragePrice of €3,000 and a GrossMargin of 5%. IronOreConcentrate sold 100,000 units, resulting in TotalRevenue of €250M, an AveragePrice of €2,500, and a GrossMargin of 8%. The TotalConcentrates sold amounted to 180,000 units, aggregating TotalRevenue of €490M, with a WeightedAverage price of €2,722. Year-to-Date metrics reflect UnitsSold at 150,000, TotalRevenue of €1.2B, AveragePrice of €800, and a GrossMargin of 15.3%. In Table 2, the ResourceCategory MeasuredResources has an EstimatedVolume of 150M tons with a Grade of 1.5g/t, TotalReserves of 50M tons, and CAPEX of €200M. IndicatedResources account for 80M tons at 1.2g/t with TotalReserves of 25M tons and CAPEX of €150M.

page.content: The InferredResources consist of 50M tons at 1.0g/t, TotalReserves of 15M tons, and CAPEX of €100M, providing a comprehensive overview of Rio Tinto's current operational and financial metrics.
